_S33_NOTE: S33 P1 batch — 9 P1 audit findings COMPLETED (originally 10, P1-7 dropped per PRIME-AUDIT Δ2 as audit false-positive — existing cutsceneOverlay.ts:364 comment documents belt-and-suspenders intent). Standard tier Council R1 ran 2026-05-16 (Grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning DISRUPTOR + Gemini-2.5-flash AUDITOR). PRIME-AUDIT 2 evidence-based overrides applied: Δ1 REVERSE Council Q1 keep no-SCHEMA_VERSION-bump (save.ts:75 documents S15 P2 / S28 P0 / S31 P0-3 additive-optional precedent; save.ts:249 throws on schemaVersion≠1 so bumping would break legacy clients), Δ2 DROP P1-7 (false-positive). Δ3/Δ4 refinements to P1-12 (use snapshot serializer) + P1-11 (JSDoc legacy fallback). Execution order: P1-12 first (replay baseline) → P1-9 → P1-8 → P1-10 → P1-11 → P1-13 → P1-6 → P1-14 → P1-15. 9 commits pushed to master (2f07f3f → 45dbf18). Net: +12 tests (576→588), bundle 467.41-467.46 KB (essentially unchanged, 32.5 KB headroom on 500 KB cap), tsc clean throughout.
session_note: S33 P1 batch — closed S30 audit P1 findings. 9 commits, 588/588 green, bundle 467.46 KB. Ready for /handoff.

priorities.label: Replay determinism test (BASELINE). New src/state/save.replay.test.ts: seed two worlds identically, run identical dispatch sequence, assert JSON.stringify(snapshot(w1)) === JSON.stringify(snapshot(w2)) (savedAt stripped per intentional-metadata). Catches future Math.random/Date.now creep.
priorities.check_method: Verified: (1) `npx vitest run src/state/save.replay.test.ts` → 4/4 passing on FIRST run after stripping savedAt timestamp (the test caught its own nondeterminism trigger — proves the assertion has real signal); (2) full suite 580/580 (576 baseline + 4 new); (3) test design covers 1000-iter run, 250-iter run, sanity-check different-seed produces different snapshot, and primitive+bond counts after stress (vacuous-empty-world guard); (4) uses production save.ts WorldSnapshot serializer per PRIME-AUDIT Δ3 (catches all deterministic-field drift automatically, not hand-picked slices); (5) commit 2f07f3f +653/-54 LOC.

priorities.label: Delete dead readyState>=2 fast-path in cutsceneOverlay.ts:377. Branch runs BEFORE video.load() (caller order: play():164 mountVideoViaShader, play():175 video.load); readyState always 0 at gate.
priorities.check_method: Verified: (1) caller order traced in cutsceneOverlay.ts — line 164 calls mountVideoViaShader, line 175 calls video.load(); readyState is HAVE_NOTHING (0) at the if-check; (2) tsc clean exit 0; (3) cutsceneOverlay.test.ts passing; (4) full suite 580/580; (5) commit b8fc542 -3 LOC body / +5 LOC explanatory comment so future devs don't reintroduce.

priorities.label: Consolidate 2 dup loadeddata listeners. mountVideoViaShader refactored from listener-attaching to setup-returning. play() captures shaderSetup and invokes it inside its own loadeddata handler. Sequence: clearTimeout → shaderSetup() → currentTime nudge → video.play().
priorities.check_method: Verified: (1) tsc clean exit 0 (signature change `void → () => void` propagated correctly); (2) cutsceneOverlay.test.ts passing; (3) save.replay.test.ts still green (unrelated but proves no cross-file regression); (4) full suite 580/580; (5) commit 26d8176 +19/-8 LOC; (6) DOM-gated runtime behavior preserved by analysis: setup is sync, no race with subsequent video.play(), clearTimeout idempotent so reorder is safe. Browser smoke deferred to end-of-session preview.

priorities.label: pseudoRand consolidation. Added one-shot pseudoRand(seed, index=0) to src/state/rng.ts as NEW export (mulberry32 generator API untouched). Removed local copies from arcFlash.ts + screenShake.ts. Math byte-exact preserved (algebraic equivalence: screenShake's seed^0===seed and 0*K===0).
priorities.check_method: Verified: (1) save.replay.test.ts still 4/4 green AFTER consolidation — proves byte-exact math preservation across the refactor (this is what P1-12 was built to guard); (2) tsc clean (new import paths resolve from arcFlash.ts ../../state/rng.ts and screenShake.ts ../state/rng.ts); (3) full suite 580/580; (4) commit 2c3726e +36/-29 LOC; (5) algebraic equivalence documented in JSDoc on pseudoRand for future maintainers (seed^0===seed, 0*K===0 reduction).

priorities.label: Add creatureId?: CreatureId to ARC_FLASH effect type (game/effects.ts). Emitted from creatureAttack.ts:111. Mixed into arcSeed(tick, sx, sy, creatureId) in arcFlash.ts:83. NetSnapshot pass-through serialize+deserialize. PRIME-AUDIT Δ1: NO SCHEMA_VERSION BUMP (additive-optional precedent S15 P2 / S28 P0 / S31 P0-3). Legacy snapshots: (undefined | 0) → 0 via bitwise OR, jitter degrades to pre-S33 pattern.
priorities.check_method: Verified: (1) tsc clean — schema change propagates through 5 files (effects.ts type, creatureAttack.ts emit, arcFlash.ts arcSeed sig + call, save.ts SerializedEffect + serializeEffect + deserializeEffect); (2) save.test.ts 20/20 with +2 new tests covering creatureId round-trip AND legacy ARC_FLASH-without-creatureId rehydrates as undefined (PRIME-AUDIT Δ4 satisfied); (3) save.replay.test.ts still green (creatureId additive on existing schema, no determinism drift); (4) full suite 582/582 (580 prior + 2 new); (5) bundle 467.41 KB (slight DECREASE due to P1-8/P1-9 cumulative dead-code removal exceeding P1-11 additions); (6) commit 5a654e7 +100/-7 LOC; (7) Council Q1 originally voted bump 2v1 — PRIME-AUDIT Δ1 reversed based on save.ts:75 documented precedent (no bump) + save.ts:249 throw-on-mismatch evidence.

priorities.label: Rename cutsceneOverlay.ts private characterSprite → videoSprite (post-S30 P0b: field now holds video, not character PNG). Scope FENCE: recipe data field characterSprite STAYS in types.ts + voltkin.ts (PNG path used by codex). Also dropped stale docstring claim about post-video crossfade + commented-out crossfadeCharacterSprite restore breadcrumb.
priorities.check_method: Verified: (1) tsc clean — private field rename + 7 call-site updates type-check; (2) grep `characterSprite` in cutsceneOverlay.ts shows only rename-history comments remain (5 refs, all in JSDoc/inline comments); (3) recipes/types.ts:41 + voltkin.ts:207 `characterSprite` data fields UNTOUCHED per scope fence; (4) full suite 582/582; (5) commit 3ed761c +19/-12 LOC.

priorities.label: Phantom-shake gate forward-defense. main.ts:683-685 — replaced `!world.bonds.has(bondId)` with shouldTriggerShakeForArcFlash(world.effects, world.tick) pure helper exported from screenShake.ts. Tied to ARC_FLASH emit (visual signal) not bond delta (side-effect). Forward-defense for Anvil cleave/AOE creatures that may sever without ARC_FLASH or flash without severing.
priorities.check_method: Verified: (1) tsc clean — new helper exported from screenShake.ts, imported in main.ts; (2) screenShake.test.ts 16/16 (10 prior + 6 new gate-predicate tests covering empty, hit, stale-tick, non-ARC, multi-effect, forward-defense BOND_SEVERED-without-ARC_FLASH); (3) full suite 588/588 (582 prior + 6 new); (4) commit 0e39dce +93/-8 LOC; (5) functionally-equivalent invariant verified: today creatureAttack.ts only emits ARC_FLASH on successful sever so the new gate fires identically to the prior `!bonds.has` gate in current code paths; the forward-defense test `BOND_SEVERED without ARC_FLASH does NOT trigger shake` locks the new invariant for Anvil's arrival.
